scenario_description: The user first asks the agent to add a contact name, then says a phone number should also be included.

command:
printf 'Equipment Maintenance Notice

To All Departments:

The company will conduct annual routine inspection of the 3rd floor server room this Saturday (July 12, 2025). Some network services will be suspended for approximately two hours (estimated 9:00 AM - 11:00 AM).

Please make arrangements in advance for any urgent business needs.

Contact: Wang Xiaoming

Administrative Department
July 8, 2025
' > /home/user/Desktop/notice.txt

DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me add "Contact: Wang Xiaoming" to the notice
Need to add the phone number too, change it to "Contact: Wang Xiaoming, Phone: 010-12345678", then save
